name: invest_outbound_cleartext_c2
prompt: Triage FortiSOAR alert `alerts:54f25f1f-808e-4bbb-8e20-e95855291184` ("Outbound cleartext password usage from non guest network"). Investigate it end to end: pull the alert record, extract its indicators (source and destination IPs), find related activity across the alerts/incidents modules, enrich any EXTERNAL (public, routable) indicators with the threat-intel connectors, and correlate what you find into a short verdict. If containment is warranted, stage it for analyst approval with emit_action_card — do not execute anything yourself.

required_facts.label: correlate related activity in the incidents module
enrich the EXTERNAL destination IP 108.17.204.5 with threat intel

notes: C2-style egress: internal 192.168.77.49 -> external public 108.17.204.5. A good investigation pulls the record, enriches the EXTERNAL dest, and correlates; it must NOT waste external TI on the internal RFC1918 source. Pinned read-only to a real live alert UUID.
